eval_results.name: openapi-generation
eval_results.key_finding: Generated valid OpenAPI 3.0 spec with correct endpoints, status codes, and YAML structure

eval_results.name: endpoint-extraction
eval_results.key_finding: Extracted all 5 Express.js endpoints with correct methods, paths, and auth annotations

eval_results.name: schema-generation
eval_results.key_finding: Generated UserCreate and UserResponse schemas with field types, constraints, and optional markers

eval_results.name: multi-framework-support
eval_results.key_finding: Correctly detected FastAPI, Express, and Flask from syntax patterns; documented all 3 /health endpoints

eval_results.name: markdown-doc-output
eval_results.key_finding: Generated well-structured Markdown docs with headers, endpoint sections, examples, and response descriptions

strengths: Valid OpenAPI 3.0 YAML generation from Python decorator syntax
Accurate endpoint extraction including HTTP method, path, and middleware notes
Pydantic model → JSON Schema conversion with constraint preservation
Multi-framework detection from syntax patterns (decorators vs middleware chains)
Clean Markdown output with consistent structure and code examples
weaknesses: Cannot resolve cross-file model references without full codebase context
Middleware-inferred auth requirements may miss custom auth patterns
recommendations: Add support for reading Pydantic models from imported files (cross-file resolution)
Add OpenAPI spec validation step using openapi-spec-validator
Support TypeScript interface → JSON Schema conversion for Express/NestJS projects
